overview: SMMPanel Pro is a premium social media marketing platform with 3-tier pricing (Basic/Recommended/Premium), 60+ services across 8 platforms, bundle packages, multi-currency/language support, smart price calculator, trust metrics, user engagement features, and a full admin panel with dedicated pricing controls.
features: 3-tier service pricing with Basic/Recommended/Premium tiers and conversion-optimized UX
60+ social media services across Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok, Telegram, Website Traffic, Business Growth, and AI Growth Tools
Bundle packages with original vs. discounted pricing and premium upgrade options
Multi-currency converter (INR, USD, AED, OMR, SAR, EUR, GBP) with auto-converted pricing
4-language support (English, Hindi, Hinglish, Arabic) with RTL for Arabic
Smart price calculator with tier comparison and premium benefit display
User engagement: daily login rewards, referral system, user levels, spin wheel, cashback, coupons
Admin Pricing section with provider cost, tier margins, bulk pricing, currency overrides, profit calculator
Trust metrics: success rate, retention score, delivery logs, admin-editable reviews
